reason: RC-004 debt: source EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS has no company-boundary column, so a COMPANY-scoped rowFilter is structurally impossible. rowFilter.column=DEPARTMENT_ID is department-level; scopeType=DEPARTMENT is not an authz-produced axis (verified: no permission-service seed / OpenFGA type / assignment path). Closure needs a first-class department scope end-to-end OR RC-004 v2 sourceQuery boundary support with a company-projecting join. Tracked: Halildeu/platform-backend#247.
